title: EY-Parthenon's Daco: Inflation, Business Investment Are Next Tariff Unknowns
description: EY-Parthenon Chief Economist Greg Daco joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the economic impacts of President Trump's tariffs being overturned by the Supreme Court. Daco says that while the US economy may currently show underlying strength, businesses will be more hesitant to invest and expand as tariff policy continues to evolve. Daco also mentions that inflation is back to being a big unknown as levies shift and legal challenges arise, and that GDP could once more be at risk thanks to Section 122 tariffs. Daco speaks with Carol Massar and Emily Graffeo. (Source: Bloomberg)
